header.title: Agents
header.description: Manage your AI Agents and their configurations

empty.title: No chatbots found
empty.description: You haven't created any agents yet. Create your first agent to start automated conversations.

dialog.title: Delete Agent
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. All conversations and data associated with this agent will be permanently removed.
dialog.error: Failed to delete agent. Please try again.

card.title: Agent Details
card.description: Configure your agent's basic information and behavior

fields.name: Name *
fields.visibility_all: Agents can see all conversations in this chatbot.
fields.visibility_assigned: Agents can only see conversations assigned to them.
fields.ai_description: If enabled, the AI will handle new conversations automatically.
fields.system_prompt_placeholder: Enter system instructions for the AI (optional)
fields.system_prompt_description: Optional instructions that define how the AI should behave
fields.status_description: Inactive agents won't respond to messages

validation.min_delay_invalid: Minimum delay must be 0 or greater
validation.max_delay_invalid: Maximum delay must be 0 or greater
validation.delay_range_invalid: Maximum delay must be greater than or equal to minimum delay

whatsappBusiness.title: WhatsApp Business API
whatsappBusiness.description: Connect via the official Meta API for scalable, reliable communication.

whatsappWeb.title: WhatsApp Web (QR)
whatsappWeb.description: Connect a number by scanning a QR code, ideal for testing and small-scale use.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure additional settings for your WhatsApp Web connection.
settings.incoming_call_description: Define a message to automatically send when you receive calls on this number.
settings.auto_reply_placeholder: Enter the message to send when a call is received...
settings.default_message: Sorry, I cannot take calls right now. Please leave a message.

generator.title: Start Conversation Link
generator.description: Generate a URL to start a conversation directly with a specific number.
generator.fill_fields: Fill in the fields below to generate an example link:
generator.message_placeholder: Enter a pre-filled message for the user...

business.connected_number_description: The WhatsApp number connected to this agent via the Official Business API.
business.test_connection_description: Scan the QR code to start a conversation.
business.no_qr_available: No QR code available. Please connect a number first.

header.title: WhatsApp Web (Unofficial) Connection
header.description: Connect a WhatsApp number using your phone.

connected.title: Connected Number
connected.description: Details of the connected WhatsApp Web number.

disconnected.scanQr: Scan the QR code to connect.
disconnected.lost: The connection was lost. Please reconnect or start a new session.

error.description: Could not verify the connection status. Please try again later.

test.title: Test Connection
test.description: Scan the QR code to start a conversation.
test.noQr: No QR code available. Please connect a number first.
